query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT hookLine) as unique_hooks FROM hooks;
SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM hooks GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PSucjba86eoTqFC.f7a34347a3f5 --database QnFo973ajezBeVYDwDUoyf --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT hookLine) as unique_hooks FROM hooks;
SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM hooks GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC;
